description_long: This is a rectangular basketball court with a dark brown wooden surface, featuring a parquet-style texture. The court is marked with standard white basketball lines, including the key, free throw circles, three-point arcs, center circle, sidelines, and baselines. The markings are crisp and clearly delineate the playing areas, giving the court a professional appearance. There are no visible basketball hoops, backboards, or fencing around the court, suggesting it is a standalone playing surface. The court appears to be designed for full-court play, with symmetrical markings on both halves. Its clean and minimalistic design is typical of modern recreational or gymnasium courts.
description: A full-sized, dark brown wooden basketball court with crisp white standard markings and a parquet-style surface, lacking hoops or fencing.
description_view_0: The court is seen from one end, highlighting the key, free throw area, and half of the court's markings.
description_view_1: A side view showing the full length of the court and the symmetry of the markings on both halves.
description_view_2: The opposite end view, mirroring view 0, with the key and free throw area visible on the far side.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, displaying the court's full length and central markings.
